lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Desktop virtualization is active. Known answer applied.', 'source': 'known'}
notes: Concept separating desktop hardware from applications allowing centralized group management; includes multiple technology approaches.
Server-and-storage approach to desktop virtualization; most common form reported in survey was server-based application hosting.

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Thin client is active (niche). Known answer applied.', 'source': 'known'}
notes: Device requiring server to fulfill most computing; no hard drive; consumes as little as 15W vs. 100-150W for full desktop. 45% of virtualizing companies use thin or stateless clients.

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Zero client is active (niche). Known answer applied.', 'source': 'known'}
notes: Extreme thin client with no software or firmware requiring management or updates; mentioned as future option in case study.

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Server virtualization is active. Known answer applied.', 'source': 'known'}
notes: Compared to desktop virtualization: has stronger direct financial benefits (reduced data center power/cooling, fewer servers); less disruptive than desktop virtualization.

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Storage virtualization is active and growing. Market projected CAGR of over 20% (2022-2026). Key trend includes software-defined storage (SDS), HCI, and hybrid cloud integration. Adoption approximately 37% as of 2018 with continued growth.', 'source': 'https://www.datacore.com/storage-virtualization/'}
notes: Cited as comparison to desktop virtualization; has strong financial benefits unlike desktop virtualization's operational focus.

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'end-of-life', 'notes': 'Windows 7 reached end-of-life January 14, 2020. Known answer applied.', 'source': 'known'}
notes: OS upgrade driver in case study; city government needed to upgrade aging PCs to Windows 7; desktop virtualization allowed single server-level upgrade.

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'evolved', 'notes': 'Original Tablet PC (Windows-based pen tablet) evolved into modern tablets (iPad, Android, Surface). Known answer applied.', 'source': 'known'}
